sentence: 这个地区近年来识字率有明显提高。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū jìnnián lái shí zì lǜ yǒu míngxiǎn tígāo.
english: The literacy rate in this area has improved noticeably in recent years.

sentence: 将军亲自前往前线受降。
pinyin: Jiāngjūn qīnzì qiánwǎng qiánxiàn shòu xiáng.
english: The general went to the front line in person to accept the surrender.

sentence: 黑洞中心存在一个奇点，物理定律在那里失效。
pinyin: Hēidòng zhōngxīn cúnzài yīgè qí diǎn, wùlǐ dìnglǜ zài nàlǐ shīxiào.
english: At the center of a black hole there is a singularity where the laws of physics break down.

sentence: 这个望远镜的倍率是二十倍。
pinyin: Zhège wàngyuǎnjìng de bèi lǜ shì èrshí bèi.
english: This telescope has a magnifying power of twenty times.

sentence: 图书馆里有一本鲁迅的年谱，记录了他的一生。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ yǒu yī běn Lǔ Xùn de nián pǔ, jìlù le tā de yīshēng.
english: The library has a chronicle of Lu Xun's life, documenting his entire life story.
